---
title: "<i>Cassell’s Magazine</i>"
---

## <i>Cassell’s Magazine</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This magazine ran 1852-1934;  Cassell’s also published several other magazines. The editor 1874-94 was H. G. B. Hunt. Arthur Butler worked for Cassell’s <i>c. </i>1890-4.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
